{{Extend "layout"}} {{Block "title"}}{{"任务列表"|$.T}}{{/Block}} {{Block "breadcrumb"}} {{Super}}
  • {{"任务列表"|$.T}}
    • {{/Block}} {{Block "main"}}
    {{$v := $.Form `desiredState`}} {{"期望状态"|$.T}}
    {{"删除选中"|$.T}} {{`新建任务`|$.T}}

    {{"任务列表"|$.T}}

    {{- range $k, $v := $.Stored.listData -}} {{- end -}}
    		{{`ID`|$.T}} {{`版本`|$.T}} {{`当前状态`|$.T}} {{`期望状态`|$.T}} {{`时间`|$.T}} {{`操作`|$.T}}
    		{{$v.ID}}

    {{`服务ID`|$.T}}: {{$v.ServiceID}}
    {{`节点ID`|$.T}}: {{$v.NodeID}}
    {{`插槽号`|$.T}}: {{$v.Slot}}
    		 {{$v.Version.Index}} {{`任务状态`|$.T}}: {{$v.Status.State}}
    {{`状态时间`|$.T}}: {{$v.Status.Timestamp.Local.Format `2006-01-02 15:04:05`}}
    {{`状态信息`|$.T}}: {{$v.Status.Message}}
    {{`错误信息`|$.T}}: {{$v.Status.Err}}
    {{`容器状态`|$.T}}: {{if $v.Status.ContainerStatus}} {{`容器ID`|$.T}}:{{$shortenID := call $.Func.ShortenID $v.Status.ContainerStatus.ContainerID}}{{$shortenID}}   {{`PID`|$.T}}:{{$v.Status.ContainerStatus.PID}}   {{`退出码`|$.T}}:{{$v.Status.ContainerStatus.ExitCode}} {{end}}
    {{`端口状态`|$.T}}: {{range $v.Status.PortStatus.Ports}}{{.|JSONEncode}}{{end}}
    		 {{$v.DesiredState}} {{`创建`|$.T}}: {{$v.CreatedAt.Local.Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05"}}
    {{`更新`|$.T}}: {{$v.CreatedAt.Local.Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05"}}
    {{$.Stored.pagination.Render}}
    {{/Block}} {{Block "footer"}} {{/Block}}
